linkingRules.hubInbound: Every supporting page must link to at least one hub using descriptive anchor text from suggestedAnchorText.
linkingRules.hubOutbound: Hub pages should link down to their supporting pages and to related hubs.
linkingRules.caseStudies: Service pages link to relevant case studies. Case studies link back to the relevant service page.
linkingRules.location: Location pages link to main service hubs and relevant case studies from that area.
linkingRules.industry: Industry pages link to relevant services and their specific case studies.
linkingRules.anchors: Use descriptive keyword-rich anchor text. Never use 'click here' or 'read more'.
linkingRules.density: 3-5 links per page minimum. Hub pages can have more. Do not over-link.
linkingRules.placement: Links only in body content. Not in header, footer, or navigation.
linkingRules.naturalness: Every link must make contextual sense to a reader. No forced links.
